name: CreateChat
title: CreateChat
description: Create a new chat. For one-on-one chats, provide 2 user IDs. For group chats, provide a topic and 2 or more user IDs.

chatType.description: Type of the chat to be created i.e oneOnOne or group.

members_upns.description: String array of real, verified user UPN email strings. Never guess or fabricate UPNs and never use values like 'me', 'me@*', placeholders, or example domains. Must include the signed-in user's UPN if it is known; if the signed-in user's UPN is not available, do NOT include it and do NOT invent a value. Omitting the signed-in user when their UPN is unknown is preferred over including a fabricated value. If any other user's UPN is unknown, you MUST first call listUsers to retrieve it. Only call this tool with real, known UPNs. Must contain at least 2 entries in all cases and exactly 2 entries for one-on-one chats. Never pass an empty array or a comma-separated string.

topic.description: The title of the chat. The chat title can be provided only if the chat is of group type.
